title: taraxacum extensifrons
intro: Taraxacum extensifrons, also known as the Japanese dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum extensifrons include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve liver function, and act as an antioxidant, helping to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum extensifrons include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, particularly in relation to digestive and skin issues.
